hooks.command: cd /home/user/Buildup_KOL && BRANCH=$(git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD) && TOOL=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_NAME" | sed 's/mcp__higgsfield__//') && (git diff --quiet && git diff --cached --quiet) && echo 'No changes to commit' || (git add -u && git commit -m "auto: sync after higgsfield/${TOOL}" && git pull origin "$BRANCH" --rebase 2>/dev/null && git push -u origin "$BRANCH" 2>/dev/null) || true
